lemma: # Hand-curated patches for Morph-it! data gaps and variant-form selection (each line
#   adjective: f1=masc.sing f2=fem.sing f3=masc.plur f4=fem.plur (replaces the whole entry)
#   verb-form: f1=PERSON f2=form (patches one present-indicative cell; the form must still
#              exist in Morph-it! for that lemma — the tool verifies it)
# triste: Morph-it! 0.48 tags the singular as ADJ:pos+f+p (data bug) and lacks m+s/f+s rows.
# marrone: only present as NOUN-M in Morph-it!; as a color adjective it is two-form.
# essere: Morph-it! lists both "è" and "é"; only "è" is correct Italian.
# dovere: "debbono" is a dated variant; modern standard is "devono".
# dare: modern standard spells "do" and "dai" without accents ("dà" keeps it).
